intent: cloud infrastructure and database subscriptions for the production stack

redemption.resource_description: Turso — Edge SQLite Pro plan for globally replicated embedded database

expected_reasoning: Redemption amount of 95.00 USDC exceeds spend_cap_remaining of 80.00 USDC; mandate cannot be fulfilled even though vendor and category are appropriate.

intent: API tooling and developer platform subscriptions for the engineering team

redemption.resource_description: Xata — Pro plan for serverless PostgreSQL with integrated full-text search

expected_reasoning: use_counter_remaining is 0; mandate is exhausted and no further redemptions are permitted regardless of remaining budget or vendor eligibility.

intent: developer tooling and SaaS subscriptions for the engineering team

redemption.resource_description: CockroachDB Serverless — metered compute and storage for distributed SQL

expected_reasoning: Mandate expired 2025-11-30; redemption falls outside the validity window. Budget and vendor are appropriate but the mandate is no longer active.

intent: cloud compute and backend service subscriptions

redemption.resource_description: QuestDB Cloud — time-series database metered ingestion for metrics workload

expected_reasoning: spend_cap_remaining is 0.00 USDC; mandate has no remaining budget. Vendor and category are appropriate but the mandate is fully spent.

intent: approved monitoring and observability spend for the infrastructure team

mandate_summary.recipient_policy: whitelisted APM vendors: datadoghq.com and honeycomb.io only — no substitutes permitted

redemption.resource_description: InfluxDB Cloud — time-series monitoring data ingestion and retention

expected_reasoning: InfluxDB is monitoring-adjacent but influxdata.com is not on the named whitelist. Mandate restricts APM spend to datadoghq.com and honeycomb.io only; no substitutes are permitted even in the same category.

intent: authorization and fine-grained access control API for the service layer

redemption.resource_description: Cerbos Hub — policy-as-code RBAC and ABAC authorization managed cloud plan

expected_reasoning: Amount of 49.50 USDC is within spend_cap_remaining of 50.00 USDC. Cerbos is a policy-based authorization service; matches access control intent. Budget is very tight but the redemption is valid.

intent: passkey-based authentication and WebAuthn identity provider for user login

redemption.resource_description: Hanko — Cloud plan for passwordless FIDO2 passkey authentication and session management

expected_reasoning: Hanko.io is a legitimate passkey and WebAuthn authentication service; matches FIDO2 identity provider intent. Domain is niche but unambiguously an auth vendor.

intent: on-chain yield and liquidity operations on approved Layer 2 protocols

mandate_summary.recipient_policy: any audited on-chain protocol deployed on Optimism or Arbitrum

redemption.resource_description: Velodrome v2 — USDC/ETH liquidity pool deposit on Optimism for trading fee yield

expected_reasoning: Velodrome is a major audited DEX on Optimism. Mandate permits any audited on-chain protocol on Optimism; redemption satisfies the open policy. Protocol and chain match.

intent: enterprise SSO and SCIM provisioning infrastructure for B2B customer onboarding

redemption.resource_description: Scalekit — Enterprise SSO and SCIM provisioning SDK for multi-tenant B2B SaaS

expected_reasoning: Scalekit is an enterprise SSO and SCIM provisioning service; matches B2B customer onboarding identity intent. Domain is less commonly known but the vendor category is unambiguous.

intent: HR and payroll data integration API for the operations automation platform

mandate_summary.recipient_policy: primary: Merge.dev (merge.dev) — equivalent unified HR and payroll APIs permitted as alternatives

redemption.resource_description: Finch — Unified Employment API for payroll, benefits, and HRIS data integration

expected_reasoning: Mandate names Merge.dev as primary but explicitly permits equivalent unified HR APIs. Finch is a direct competitor in the Unified Employment API space; the secondary-vendor condition is satisfied.
